description.en: Attacks the enemy and gains <color=#28d9ed>Barrier</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>.\nBarrier strength increases as own <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> increases.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>シールド</color>を獲得する。\n自分の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>が高いほどシールド量がUPする。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>실드</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 획득합니다.\n실드량은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>이 높을수록 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人并获得<color=#28d9ed>护盾</color>,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。\n护盾量随自身<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>的提升而增加。

description.en: Attacks all enemies.\nDecreases target's <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color>, <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color>, <color=#28d9ed>Critical Damage</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>.\nAfter attacking, increases own <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。\n対象の<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>、<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>、<color=#28d9ed>会心ダメージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。\n攻撃後、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPさせる。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다.\n대상의 <color=#28d9ed>관통력</color>, <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>, <color=#28d9ed>치명 피해</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.\n공격 후 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人。\n使目标的<color=#28d9ed>穿透</color>、<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>、<color=#28d9ed>暴击伤害</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。\n攻击后,自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>增加<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。

description.en: Before using the skill, removes Buff effects from all enemies, then attacks all enemies.\nIncreases own <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color>, <color=#28d9ed>Critical Chance</color>, <color=#28d9ed>Critical Damage</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>.\nAfter attacking, increases own <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>.
description.jp: スキル使用前、敵全体の強化効果を解除した後、敵全体にダメージを与える。\n自分の<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>、<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>、<color=#28d9ed>会心ダメージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間UPさせる。\n攻撃後、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>UPさせる。
description.kr: 스킬 사용 전 적 전체의 강화 효과를 해제한 뒤, 적 전체를 공격합니다.\n자신의 <color=#28d9ed>관통력</color>, <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>, <color=#28d9ed>치명 피해</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.\n공격 후 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: 使用技能前解除全体敌人的强化效果,随后攻击全体敌人。\n使自身的<color=#28d9ed>穿透</color>、<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>、<color=#28d9ed>暴击伤害</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。\n攻击后,自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>增加<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>。

description.en:
(Passive Effect) damage taken decreases by up to <color=#28d9ed>90%</color> in proportion to the number of <color=#28d9ed>Buff</color> effects obtained from <color=#28d9ed>Reproduction: Dragon's Wave</color>.
Damage of <color=#28d9ed>Curse/Fixed Damage</color> taken by the boss does not exceed <color=#28d9ed>30000</color>.

If not in <color=#28d9ed>Berserk</color> state, WG damage taken decreases by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>.
At the end of enemy action, if the target is <color=#28d9ed>Dark</color> attribute, WG decreases by 2.
description.jp:
(パッシブ効果) <color=#28d9ed>再現:竜の波動</color>で獲得した<color=#28d9ed>強化</color>効果の数に比例して、受けるダメージが最大<color=#28d9ed>90%</color>までDOWNする。
ボスが受ける<color=#28d9ed>呪い/固定ダメージ</color>は<color=#28d9ed>30000</color>を超えない。

<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>状態でない場合、受けるWGダメージが<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>DOWNする。
敵の行動終了時、対象が<color=#28d9ed>闇属性</color>であればWGが2減少する。
description.kr:
(패시브 효과)  <color=#28d9ed>재현: 용의 파동</color>으로 획득한 <color=#28d9ed>강화</color> 효과 개수에 비례하여 받는 피해가 최대 <color=#28d9ed>90%</color> 까지 감소합니다.
보스가 입는 <color=#28d9ed>저주/고정 피해</color>의 피해는 <color=#28d9ed>30000</color>을 초과하지 않습니다.

<color=#28d9ed>광폭화</color> 상태가 아니라면 받는 WG 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 감소합니다.
적 행동 종료 시 대상이 <color=#28d9ed>암속성</color> 이면 WG가 2 감소합니다.
description.zh:
(被动效果) 根据<color=#28d9ed>再现:龙之波动</color>获得的<color=#28d9ed>强化</color>效果数量,受到的伤害最多降低<color=#28d9ed>90%</color>。
首领受到的<color=#28d9ed>诅咒/固定伤害</color>不超过<color=#28d9ed>30000</color>。

若不处于<color=#28d9ed>狂暴</color>状态,受到的WG伤害降低<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>。
敌方行动结束时,若目标为<color=#28d9ed>暗属性</color>,则WG减少2点。

description.en: (Passive Effect) All attacks ignore <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> of the target's Defense, and additionally ignore up to <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> of the target's Defense in proportion to the number of <color=#28d9ed>Buff</color> effects obtained from <color=#28d9ed>Reproduction: Dragon's Wave</color>.\nAt the end of enemy action, increases own <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by up to <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> in proportion to the number of <color=#28d9ed>Debuff</color> effects the target has.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果) すべての攻撃は対象の防御力を<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>無視し、<color=#28d9ed>再現:竜の波動</color>で獲得した<color=#28d9ed>強化</color>効果が多いほど、対象の防御力を追加で最大<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>無視する。\n敵の行動終了時、対象が保有する<color=#28d9ed>弱体</color>効果が多いほど、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を最大<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>UPさせる。
description.kr: (패시브 효과) 모든 공격은 대상의 방어력을 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>무시하고, <color=#28d9ed>재현: 용의 파동</color>으로 획득한 <color=#28d9ed>강화</color> 효과 개수에 비례하여 대상의 방어력을 추가로 최대 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 무시합니다.\n적 행동 종료 시 대상이 보유한 <color=#28d9ed>약화</color> 효과 개수에 비례하여 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 최대 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: (被动效果) 所有攻击无视目标<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>的防御力,并根据<color=#28d9ed>再现:龙之波动</color>获得的<color=#28d9ed>强化</color>效果数量,额外无视目标最多<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>的防御力。\n敌方行动结束时,根据目标持有的<color=#28d9ed>弱化</color>效果数量,使自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>最多提升<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>。

description.en:
Becomes <color=#28d9ed>Enraged</color> every time the enemy performs 7 actions.

<color=#28d9ed>Enraged</color>: Grants an irremovable effect to the caster that increases Attack and reduces damage taken for 3 turns. Enraged lasts for 3 turns.

<color=#28d9ed>Evolution: Dragon's Wrath</color>: Used when Enraged ends. Deals great damage to all enemies.
description.jp:
敵が7回行動するたびに<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>状態に切り替わる。

<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>:自分に解除不可能な攻撃力UP/ダメージDOWN効果を3ターンの間付与する。【狂暴化】は3ターンの間継続する。

<color=#28d9ed>【進化:竜の怒り】</color>:【狂暴化】終了時に使用する。
敵全体に大ダメージを与える。
description.kr:
적이 7회 행동할 때 마다 <color=#28d9ed>광폭화</color> 상태로 전환합니다.

<color=#28d9ed>광폭화 돌입</color> : 자신에게 해제되지 않는 공격력 증가/피해 감소 효과를 3턴 동안 부여합니다. 광폭화는 3턴 동안 유지됩니다.

<color=#28d9ed>진화 : 용의 분노</color> : 광폭화 종료 시 사용.
적 전체에게 큰 피해를 입힙니다.
description.zh:
敌人每行动7次,则进入<color=#28d9ed>狂暴化</color>状态。

<color=#28d9ed>陷入狂暴化</color>:使自身获得无法解除的攻击力提升/伤害降低效果,持续3回合。狂暴化持续3回合。

<color=#28d9ed>进化:龙之怒</color>:狂暴化结束时发动。
对全体敌人造成巨额伤害。
